_comment: Agent configuration — all API parameters in one place. Load this file to configure which STT/TTS/LLM the agent uses.

agent.name: Aria
agent.greeting: Namaste! Main Aria hoon, aapki Airtel assistant. Main aapki help kar sakti hoon data balance, recharge, bill payment, network issues, aur plan upgrade mein. Aap kya jaanna chahte hain?

sarvam._comment_lang: language_code sent only when useLangHint=true and previous turn language is known

openai_whisper.prompt: Airtel customer care. Hindi, English, or Hinglish.

validation._comment: 44 byte WAV header + 16000 samples = ~0.5s minimum audio

sarvam.speaker: arya
sarvam._comment_speaker: Female: anushka, manisha, vidya, arya, ritu, priya | Male: abhilash, karun, hitesh, anand

openai._comment_model: Available on this account: gpt-4.1, gpt-4.1-mini, gpt-4.1-nano, gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4-turbo
openai._comment_maxTokens: 120 = ~2 short sentences. Increase for longer responses.
openai._comment_temperature: 0.0-1.0 — lower is more deterministic, higher is more creative

voiceRules: No bullet points, lists, markdown, or symbols.
No filler: never start with Certainly, Sure, Of course, I understand.
systemPrompt.scopeRule: For GENERAL questions about Airtel services answer them regardless of user's current plan. Out of scope topics: reply in one sentence that you only help with Airtel services.
systemPrompt.verificationRule: NEVER ask for mobile number or verification — account is already verified.

vad._comment_positive: Confidence threshold to START speech detection (0-1)
vad._comment_negative: Confidence threshold to END speech detection (0-1)
vad._comment_minSpeechMs: Clips shorter than this are discarded as noise
vad._comment_echoMute: Ignore VAD for this many ms after agent starts speaking (prevents echo triggers)
